item.title: Premium: What If...We're In An AI Bubble? (Part 2) 摘要
item.description:
The article continues the 'What If We're In An AI Bubble?' series, exploring the cascading consequences of slowing data center construction. It argues that if data centers aren't built fast enough, OpenAI and Anthropic can't expand, hyperscalers lose promised revenue, $178.5 billion in debt goes unpaid, NVIDIA struggles to sell next-gen GPUs, and banks stop lending. The author contends that AI compute demand is inflated by just two companies, and that data centers are being built on speculative debt without genuine broad demand, leading to potential financial collapse.
标签: AI bubble, data centers, GPU demand, hyperscalers, NVIDIA, AI economics, venture capital, private credit, tech debt, AI industry

item.title: Planescape: Torment, Part 1: From the Tabletop… 摘要
item.description:
This article is the first part of a retrospective on Planescape: Torment, examining its origins in the Dungeons & Dragons tabletop setting. It discusses how the game, released in 1999 by Interplay/Black Isle Studios, adapted TSR's Planescape campaign setting, which expanded on Gary Gygax's original cosmology of inner and outer planes. The article highlights the game's unique narrative ambition as a genuine interactive tragedy, contrasting with typical RPG power fantasies, while acknowledging its flaws in pacing, interface, and combat. It emphasizes the often-overlooked influence of TSR's creative work on the game's distinctive identity.
标签: Planescape: Torment, CRPG, Dungeons & Dragons, game narrative, interactive tragedy, Black Isle Studios, TSR, game history, retrospective, Infinity Engine

item.title: Lawmakers Demand Answers as CISA Tries to Contain Data Leak 摘要
item.description:
U.S. lawmakers from both houses of Congress are demanding answers from CISA after a contractor leaked AWS GovCloud keys and other secrets on a public GitHub account named 'Private-CISA'. The contractor disabled GitHub's secret protection and used the repo as a scratchpad since November 2025. CISA initially claimed no data compromise, but security experts found that an exposed RSA private key granting full access to CISA-IT GitHub repos remained active for days. CISA is still working to invalidate leaked credentials, while experts warn that adversaries likely monitored the public GitHub feed and may have accessed the secrets.
标签: CISA, data breach, GitHub, AWS GovCloud, credential leak, cybersecurity, government, contractor, supply chain risk, incident response

item.title: Stephen Colbert’s ‘The Late Show’ Finale 摘要
item.description:
Stephen Colbert's final 'Late Show' aired on Thursday night, concluding a controversial cancellation. The episode was an emotional and bizarre wake, more like a surreal comedy finale than a talk show. It featured a Beatle, two songs, and no new project announcements. The finale was praised as amazingly good, fun, surprising, and perfectly on-brand, ending Colbert's tenure in his own unique style.
标签: Stephen Colbert, The Late Show, TV finale, comedy, talk show, cancellation, surreal, Beatles, New York Times, Daring Fireball

item.title: Zero Sum Problems and Apple Sports 摘要
item.description:
Kieran Healy analyzes Apple Sports' confusing 'zero sum' team stats visualization, arguing the core problem is information design rather than data visualization. He explains that displaying fifteen pairs of related but distinct numbers for two teams cannot be effectively shown in a single graph. The attempt to make stats visually appealing backfires, creating confusion. Healy suggests a simple table would be clearer, even if boring. The article also notes Apple Sports uses the same screen layout for all sports, complicating the design. Gruber agrees, emphasizing that the current approach prioritizes style over clarity.
标签: Apple Sports, data visualization, information design, UI/UX, sports stats, user experience, design criticism, Kieran Healy, John Gruber

item.title: The Ninth Circuit Appeal Ruling in ‘Epic v. Apple’ That Apple Is Seeking to Overturn at the Supreme Court (PDF) 摘要
item.description:
The Ninth Circuit issued a ruling in the Epic v. Apple case, which Apple is now petitioning the Supreme Court to overturn. The ruling includes a summary for reader convenience and addresses Apple's argument that, under Trump v. CASA, an injunction on commissions should apply only to Epic Games, not all U.S. App Store developers. This argument is covered on page 50 of the decision.
标签: Apple, Epic Games, Supreme Court, Ninth Circuit, App Store, antitrust, legal, injunction, commissions, Trump v. CASA

item.title: How to Talk to Your Coworkers 摘要
item.description:
Developers often complain that colleagues repeatedly ask questions already answered in documentation or Jira. This happens because developers communicate in technical instructions while non-technical coworkers rely on conversations. The solution is to translate information into the audience's frame of reference and repeat it patiently. For example, instead of explaining technical details like API changes or caching strategies, focus on what the solution does, such as 'we updated the widget to show real-time data.' Repetition helps people gradually understand complex concepts. Effective communication requires tailoring messages to the audience and accepting that repetition is normal and necessary.
标签: communication, developer experience, teamwork, documentation, technical writing, management, empathy, knowledge transfer, collaboration, soft skills

item.title: News about Raspberry Pi 6 and Microcontroller Development 摘要
item.description:
In a Reddit AMA, Raspberry Pi engineers (CEO Eben Upton, Gordon Hollingworth, James Adams) discussed the timeline for Raspberry Pi 6. Based on previous launch cycles (Pi 5 in 2023, Pi 4 in 2019, etc.), the Pi 6 is expected 3-4 years after Pi 5, likely in 2026 or 2027. The AMA also covered microcontroller development and other topics.
标签: Raspberry Pi, Raspberry Pi 6, hardware, single-board computer, AMA, product roadmap, engineering, embedded systems

item.title: ★ The Fonts of the U.S. Federal Courts 摘要
item.description:
The article examines typographic choices across U.S. federal courts of appeals, noting that most use Times New Roman, while the First and Fourth Circuits use Courier New with full justification, which is criticized. The Second and Seventh Circuits use Palatino, with the Seventh's wider margins improving readability. The Fifth Circuit upgraded from Century Schoolbook to Equity in 2020, praised as typographically superior. The Supreme Court uses Century Schoolbook, maintaining consistency for over a century, and requires submissions to use a Century family font. The author argues that courts should adopt better typography to reflect the dignity of their work, citing Judge Willett's rationale that presentation matters.
标签: typography, U.S. federal courts, font, legal design, Times New Roman, Century Schoolbook, Equity, Palatino, Courier New, court opinions

item.title: The memory shortage is causing a repricing of consumer electronics 摘要
item.description:
Memory manufacturers have fixed wafer capacity split between DDR, LPDDR, and HBM. AI data center growth has increased HBM's wafer allocation from 2% to an expected 20% by end of 2026, and HBM consumes over three times the wafer capacity per gigabyte compared to other memory types. This shift, combined with manufacturers' cautious under-provisioning, is constraining consumer-device RAM production, leading to price increases. The sub-$100 smartphone market, crucial for Africa and South Asia, is already affected.
标签: memory, AI, smartphones, hardware, semiconductors, HBM, consumer electronics, pricing, supply chain, technology trends
